wargear.modifiers.title: Modifiers
app_features.armor_badges.title: Imported Armor Badges
app_features.armor_badges.summary: Imported armor cards on the Raid Home screen show tappable badges for role, guild rank and version, so you can cycle them and recalculate stats instantly.
app_features.armor_badges.quick_1: Import an armor into a knight or friend slot from Wargear Wardrobe.
app_features.armor_badges.quick_2: Tap the Role, Rank or Version badge on the Home card.
app_features.armor_badges.quick_3: Each tap cycles the badge and recalculates the imported armor stats.
